title: Jujutsu Craft (Sorcery Fight)
body:
### DISCLAIMER

This is a **NON-PROFIT**, fan-made project created for community enjoyment. It is **NOT** affiliated with, endorsed by, or associated with Gege Akutami, Shueisha, MAPPA, or the "Jujutsu Kaisen" Production Committee. **NO COPYRIGHT INFRINGEMENT IS INTENDED**. All intellectual property rights belong to their respective owners.

Use of internal data such as textures and models is **PROHIBITED**.

## 

**Jujutsu Craft Mod transforms your Minecraft world into a perilous domain infested with Cursed Spirits.**
  
- **Vast Content**: Over 150 types of Cursed Spirits and Jujutsu Sorcerers appear as entities. More than 30 unique Cursed Tools will diversify your combat style even further.
  
- **Master Cursed Techniques**: Players can choose from over 40 different Cursed Techniques. Select your favorite and unleash its true power!
  
- **Strategic Battles**: Engage in thrilling battles against Cursed Spirits and Cursed Users with a deep combat system utilizing skills, guarding, and backstepping.
  
- **Growth and Evolution**: Gather "Fame" by exorcising Cursed Spirits to raise your rank as a Jujutsu Sorcerer. As your rank increases, your stats will be enhanced, and more powerful techniques and Cursed Techniques will be unlocked.
  
- **Acquire Ultimate Jujutsu**: By meeting specific conditions, you can master iconic techniques from the original series, such as "Domain Expansion," "Reverse Cursed Technique," and "Simple Domain," aiming to become a true Special Grade Jujutsu Sorcerer.

# Survival
When you start your game with the Jujutsu Craft Mod installed, you'll receive a "Skill Selection Book." By right-clicking this book, you can gain the abilities of your favorite Jujutsu Kaisen characters.
![Skill Selection Book](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8398f47f5c621869f764e4051535b34a06d13ac2.jpeg)

### Fame and Rank
Build your "Fame" by battling Cursed Spirits.

Use various techniques, guards, and backsteps according to your keybinds to exorcise Curses. Earning Fame will cause your rank to increase after accumulating a certain amount.

As your rank goes up, you'll gain the following benefits:
- Your stats will improve, making you stronger.
- The types of techniques you can use will expand, broadening your combat options.
- You'll encounter more powerful characters (Jujutsu Sorcerers and Cursed Spirits), leading to new challenges.

### 3 Types of Advancements
Jujutsu Craft Mod's Advancements are broadly divided into three ategories:
- Character Advancements

  These are advancements tied to a character's unique techniques and abilities. Fulfilling specific conditions unlocks new techniques for that character, expanding your combat versatility.
  
- Skill Advancements
  
  These are advancements for skills that can be used by all characters. For example, you can learn important abilities central to the Jujutsu Kaisen world, such as "Simple Domain" and "Reverse Cursed Technique."

- Battle Advancements

  These advancements are achieved by defeating "named characters." However, a crucial point: repeatedly respawning and attacking in a "zombie strategy" will not count towards these advancements. Aim for true victory!

The ultimate Jujutsu Sorcerer would be defined as one who has achieved all "Skill Advancements" and "Battle Advancements."
![Domain Expansion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1eb99ed0f836b3478430f0318cea63a8415ac008.jpeg)

### Exploring Cursed Structures
The world generates many structures, ranging from those appearing in the original series like "Cursed Temples," "Deserted Shopping Streets," and "Heian-era Towns," to original creations by the mod. Some of these structures are extremely dangerous, inhabited by powerful Curses.

However, venturing into these perilous locations might lead you to discover powerful Cursed Tools or gain large amounts of Fame. Dare to step into the unknown!

![Structure](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b66dbc1d59d9b6654a2bb3ecbb1b1a97bbb66466.jpeg)

# PvP
In the Jujutsu Craft Mod, **PvP (Player versus Player)** is also one of the highly popular content features.

### How to Start PvP
Unleash All Abilities: First, execute the following command:
> /advancement grant @a everything

This will awaken all players as Special Grade Jujutsu Sorcerers, making all techniques available for use.

Next, execute this command:
> /gamerule jujutsuPVP true

This enables PvP, allowing you to start intense battles between Jujutsu Sorcerers anytime!

The Mod features over 40 different characters, each possessing unique strengths and abilities. Victory is within your grasp, depending on your fighting style, no matter which character you choose.

# Key Settings

R : Change cursed technique

Z : Use selected cursed technique

X : Reset technique selection

Shift (Sneak) : Guard and Jump boost

S + Jump : Backstep

G : Simple Domain (need advancement grant)

M : Reverse Cursed Technique (need advancement grant)

It is especially important to use the R, Z, and Shift keys


# Commands

/gamerule jujutsuPVP <true/false>

/gamerule jujutsuUpgradeDifficulty <value>

/gamerule jujutsuGainFame <true/false>

# Helps

Change minecraft difficulty (easy, normal, or hard) if you find the game is too difficult or too easy. The strength of the entities will change greatly.

# 
### Credits
This is a fan-made recreation based on the original works: "Jujutsu Kaisen" by Gege Akutami / Shueisha / MAPPA

# 
This mod developed in MCreator

MCreator→https://mcreator.net/
